# UC-15.5.7 · CCTV Camera Firmware Version Inventory and Compliance

## Description

Stale firmware clusters cameras for CVE exposure; inventory proves patch cadence to auditors.

## Value

Reduces exploit risk from default credentials bugs.

## Implementation

(1) Weekly poll VMS. (2) Join vendor advisory CSV. (3) Maintenance window automation.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-1d
| eval fw=coalesce(firmware_version, sw_version, "")
| eval model=coalesce(camera_model, vendor_model, "")
| stats values(fw) as firmware dc(fw) as fw_variants by vendor model
| where fw_variants>1 OR match(fw, "(?i)2018|v1\.0")
```

## Visualization

Version pie; compliance bar.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
